items.title: After Decade-Long Freeze, Ex-MOH Official Demands Annual Cigarette Tax Hikes
items.summary: Ex-MOH public health chief Lokman Hakim wants annual 5% cigarette tax hikes after a decade-long freeze, as smoking has become more affordable. MOF says it focused on curbing illicit cigarettes. Researchers blame smuggling on weak enforcement, not taxes. The post After Decade-Long Freeze, Ex-MOH Official Demands Annual Cigarette Tax Hikes appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: When Austerity Has Different Boarding Passes — Concerned Doctor
items.summary: The government must publish the cost of its 50 overseas trips taken in 50 days. Hospitals are expected to justify every expenditure. The public deserves to understand the choice to impose austerity in health care but to allow numerous international visits. The post When Austerity Has Different Boarding Passes — Concerned Doctor appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Collapse Of Malaysian Public Health Care: Not A Doomsday Prediction, But A Reality Already Here — Subspecialist
items.summary: If meaningful action is not taken now, future generations may look back on this period as the moment Malaysia's public health care system crossed a threshold from which recovery became exponentially more difficult. The post The Collapse Of Malaysian Public Health Care: Not A Doomsday Prediction, But A Reality Already Here — Subspecialist appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Couch Is The Killer: Why Malaysia Must Redesign Movement, Not Just Medicine — Dr Rajeentheran Suntheralingam
items.summary: Malaysia is the fattest nation in Southeast Asia, and we are paying for it with kidneys that fail, hearts that give out, and a public health system that is buckling under the weight of preventable illness. The post The Couch Is The Killer: Why Malaysia Must Redesign Movement, Not Just Medicine — Dr Rajeentheran Suntheralingam appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Ministers, Officials Go Around The World On 50 Trips In 50 Days
items.summary: PM, KSN, ministers, deputies, and officials from 22 ministries travelled abroad on at least 50 trips in 50 days from May 1 to Asia, Europe, UK, US, and Australasia, averaging at one daily overseas visit even as steep budget cuts squeeze the health service. The post Ministers, Officials Go Around The World On 50 Trips In 50 Days appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Strengthening Malaysia’s Future Subspecialist Workforce Development — College Of Physicians Malaysia
items.summary: The College is concerned that unresolved issues relating to LNPT and the recognition of service performed during recognised training programmes may inadvertently disadvantage MMed-trained physicians and delay progression towards subspecialty training. The post Strengthening Malaysia’s Future Subspecialist Workforce Development — College Of Physicians Malaysia appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: I Quit — Rejected Palliative Medicine Subspecialty Training Applicant
items.summary: Despite the well-recognised shortage of palliative medicine physicians nationwide, my application was unsuccessful. I have made the difficult decision to resign from the Ministry of Health and pursue my career in the private sector as a general specialist. The post I Quit — Rejected Palliative Medicine Subspecialty Training Applicant appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Food Subsidies Spared From Budget Cuts: Agriculture Ministry
items.summary: Agriculture Ministry sec-gen Isham Ishak says food production subsidies remain protected, despite spending cuts across ministries. KPKM is also planning a Food Security Act to provide long-term legal, financial, and policy support for food security. The post Food Subsidies Spared From Budget Cuts: Agriculture Ministry appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Caught Between Ayam Gepuk And Weight Loss Injections: A Public Health Warning For Malaysia’s Youth — Nor Zehan Ahmad, Dr Noor Hanita Zaini & Dr Noor Hasliza Che Seman
items.summary: The generation caught between ayam gepuk and weight-loss injections should not be blamed. It is a generation growing up in a complex health environment. The real issue is not that young people enjoy food, but that insecurity has become a market. The post Caught Between Ayam Gepuk And Weight Loss Injections: A Public Health Warning For Malaysia’s Youth — Nor Zehan Ahmad, Dr Noor Hanita Zaini & Dr Noor Hasliza Che Seman appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: SG Lim Concludes 2,200Km Run For Gold, Raises Over RM700,000 For Children With Cancer
items.summary: Run for Gold draws inspiration from the Gold Ribbon, the universal symbol for childhood cancer awareness, representing the preciousness of children and the courage, strength, and resilience of young patients and their families. The post SG Lim Concludes 2,200Km Run For Gold, Raises Over RM700,000 For Children With Cancer appeared first on CodeBlue .
